title: Salem steel sector readies post-poll capacity expansion plans
summary: Salem's stainless-steel and engineering manufacturers are finalising post-poll capacity expansion plans worth Rs 1,800 crore, contingent on the next government's industrial-power tariff stance.

title: 11 Salem Assembly seats to be counted at four secured centres on May 4
summary: Counting for Salem district's 11 Assembly seats will take place at four designated centres in Salem city, Yercaud, Mettur and Attur, with 22 counting halls and over 800 staff deployed.

title: Mettur dam touches 92 ft as Cauvery inflows pick up
summary: The Mettur dam water level has risen to 92 feet against full capacity of 120 feet, following increased inflows from upstream Karnataka over the past 96 hours.

title: Yercaud hill station crowded as weekend tourist arrivals surge
summary: Yercaud has seen a sharp surge in weekend tourist arrivals with hotel occupancy crossing 95 percent, prompting traffic regulation along the 20-hairpin bend ghat road from this morning.

title: Salem Junction redevelopment design unveiled by Southern Railway
summary: Southern Railway has released the new redevelopment master plan for Salem Junction featuring a sky concourse, three additional platforms and integrated multimodal transit hub, with work targeted to commence in October.

title: Salem mango farmers adopt Israeli high-density farming model
summary: Over 400 mango farmers across Salem have adopted the Israeli high-density orchard model, with average yields up by 60 percent versus traditional planting in the first commercial year.

title: Heavy rain warning for Salem and Namakkal from May 3
summary: IMD has placed Salem and Namakkal under a heavy rainfall warning effective May 3 as the trough system moves further south, with isolated heavy showers expected through May 4.

title: Salem Steel Plant signs MoU with IIT Madras for green-steel research
summary: Salem Steel Plant has signed a five-year research MoU with IIT Madras to develop hydrogen-based green-steel production techniques targeting 30 percent emission reduction.

title: Salem civic body launches doorstep drainage cleaning service
summary: Salem Corporation has launched a doorstep drainage and storm-water-line cleaning service through a dedicated mobile app, with a 24-hour response commitment for monsoon-readiness complaints.

title: Sankari truck terminal completes phase-1 commissioning
summary: The Rs 240 crore Sankari truck terminal — the largest in central Tamil Nadu — has completed phase-1 commissioning with capacity for 800 long-haul trucks at any time.

title: Attur block schools launch Tamil-medium AI literacy curriculum
summary: Forty government higher secondary schools across the Attur block have begun teaching a state-developed Tamil-medium AI literacy curriculum for Class 9 and 10 students from this academic term.

title: Sago millers seek MSP framework to stabilise tapioca prices
summary: Salem's sago manufacturers' federation has formally sought a Minimum Support Price framework for tapioca, citing wide price swings that have hurt both farmers and processing units this season.

title: Salem-Chennai Vande Bharat trial run scheduled for June launch
summary: Southern Railway has scheduled the trial run of a Salem-Chennai Vande Bharat Express on May 12, paving the way for full commercial operations from the first week of June.
